text: This Unconditional Waiver and Release of Lien upon Progress Payment waives and releases all claims of every kind that Subcontractor has or may have in connection with Contractor, the Project and the Property  through the Release Date, and which could be asserted against the Project, the Property, Contractor, Owner, any lender on the Project and all officers, shareholders, members, managers, directors, agents and employees of any of them. This Unconditional Waiver and Release of Lien Upon Progress Payment covers all claims through the Release Date except for retention.
